meta.name: Pursuit of Perfection - The Indy 500 with Conor Daly
meta.description: Pursuit of Perfection follows Conor Daly during the weekend of the Indianapolis 500, the most coveted prize in American open-wheel racing. As engines fire and pressure builds, Daly navigates the highs, lows, and unpredictable moments, offering an intimate look at what life is like for a driver chasing victory at the Greatest Spectacle in Racing.  Conor Daly is a native of Noblesville, Indiana, and much of the film was shot in and around the Indianapolis Motor Speedway.
